vibe: Moody, literary, cinematic, late-night writing, ink on parchment.

typography.reader_body: text-xl sm:text-2xl leading-[2] tracking-wide text-text_primary max-w-prose mx-auto

Hero.layout: Asymmetric split or center-aligned with massive typography and generous negative space.
Hero.cta: Prominent 'Brain Dump' button using the primary color (#8A2E3B) with a subtle glow.
Hero.background: Dark charcoal with a subtle, dark-academia themed background image overlay (max 20% opacity) or noise texture.

Brain_Dump_Composer.container: Max-w-4xl mx-auto, border border-white/10 p-8 md:p-12 bg-[#161618]/50 backdrop-blur-sm
Brain_Dump_Composer.textarea: Massive text area, borderless, text-2xl font-body leading-relaxed, placeholder text subtle
Brain_Dump_Composer.controls: Bottom bar containing a voice recording button (lucide-react mic icon) and a Shadcn slider for 'De-AI-fy' vocabulary level.

Story_Vibe_Selector.layout: Grid of visual cards (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4)
Story_Vibe_Selector.cards: Each card has a distinct mood overlay. Dark & Gritty (Black/Crimson), Poetic Slow-Burn (Deep Emerald), Fast-Paced Thriller (High-contrast Indigo), Cozy Nostalgic (Warm Amber). Use CSS gradients or muted images.
Story_Vibe_Selector.interaction: On hover, the card image scales up slightly and border turns to accent color (#C4A47C).

Story_Reader_View.typography: Reader_body styling (large Lora font, double spacing).
Story_Reader_View.controls: 'Continue Story' button at the bottom. Floating or sticky bottom bar for Co-Author mode.

Co_Author_Mode.layout: Shadcn Dialog or a floating command-palette style input (Shadcn Command/Popover) mid-story to inject directives.
Co_Author_Mode.typography: Use font_mono for directives to distinguish from the literary story text.

Character_Lore_Locker.layout: Shadcn Sheet sliding from the right.
Character_Lore_Locker.content: List of character cards and lore snippets. Dark, dense layout using the bento grid protocol internally.

Digital_Bookshelf.layout: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A: Tetris Grid). Mix of large featured stories and smaller saved stories.
Digital_Bookshelf.aesthetic: Book-spine aesthetic using vertical text or tall narrow cards (col-span-2 row-span-4).

Daily_Prompts.layout: A distinctly styled card, maybe with a parchment texture background, standing out from the dark theme.

hero_background.description: Aesthetic flat lay with typewriter and rustic elements, use as hero background with heavy dark overlay (opacity 10-15%).

vibe_dark_gritty.description: Dark room filled with books, for 'Dark & Gritty' vibe card.

vibe_poetic.description: Lake surrounded by trees in autumn, for 'Poetic Slow-Burn' vibe card.

vibe_nostalgic.description: Vintage magical journal with dry leaf, for 'Cozy Nostalgic' vibe card.

texture_parchment.description: Vintage parchment texture, use for Daily Prompt card or subtle UI accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark luxury theme. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Always use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Lora for body.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
For the Brain Dump composer, use a Shadcn Slider for the 'De-AI-fy' level and integrate a clear Voice recording button.
The Story Reader view must be distraction-free with generous line height and max-width.
Implement the Co-Author mode as a floating UI (e.g., Shadcn Dialog/Popover) that does not break the reading flow.
The Character & Lore Locker should be a Shadcn Sheet accessible from the Reader view.
The Digital Bookshelf should utilize the Bento grid protocol with book-spine vertical aesthetics where possible.
Never use pure black or white. Use the tinted shades defined in the colors object.
